name: AECOM Technology Corp.
h1: AECOM Technology's GCC footprint in India
lede: AECOM Technology runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Gurugram, covering gbs, built over eighteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AECOM Technology office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AECOM Technology Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AECOM Technology runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram), covering gbs. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does AECOM Technology operate in India?
faq.a: AECOM Technology operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AECOM Technology have GCC centers in?
faq.a: AECOM Technology's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Gurugram.

faq.a: AECOM Technology runs gbs centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AECOM Technology's India GCCs?
faq.a: AECOM Technology's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AECOM Technology's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 21 leaders at AECOM Technology's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.
